name: The Beauty & The Nerd
description:
Congratulations! You and Alexis just won the gameshow 'theBeauty&theNerd'. Your price is a dream holiday with her!................................................................

You took part in the gameshow 'The Beauty & The Nerd'.

The rules are pretty simple; 7 nerds and 7 beauties get paired up in couples and are getting to compete against each other. It's simple trash TV but a lot of people still watch it. You got to be on a team with Alexis and somehow you won the whole thing! Your prize is a two week long trip to an seculded private resort in the maledives. Sounds like a dream? Well, there is Alexis.

Alexis is a 'famous' social media influencer and she only went on the show to get more followers on instagram and her youtube channel...

...And it worked, I mean look at her. Now she got millions of new followers, tousands of men in her dm's wanting to spoil her but she is stuck with you for the next two weeks. #goodluck...

................................................................

(Sound The Chainsmokers - #selfie (spotify))

................................................................

Me yapping, no need to read:

The Bot is 'anypov' because there are female nerds too. If you don't like the scenario or being called a nerd then don't chat, simple as that. I am not gonna change it.

That TheJeffster and Mr_Nomad are both taking a break at the same time is a great loss for the 'niche' of well written futa/trans/femboy chatbots. I wish both of them all the best; Mr Nomand with his new Adult Visual Novel Game and the Jeffster a long, refreshing and well deserved break. Both are an inspiration. <3

................................................................

enough yapping, #bonuspic:

................................................................
creator: Cynisca
